title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 27 2022
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 27 2022
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 27 2022
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 27/12/2022
DCE iron ore futures rose by 1.83% today, the main contract closed 836. The traders' willingness to ship is more.The steel mills are wait and see.The overall trading sentiment of the market is general.PBF at Shandong port dealt 825-829 yuan/mt,increase 2-14 yuan/mt. From a macro perspective, the market is no longer optimistic about the news of the implementation of full nucleic acid testing for inbound personnel.
